name: audits
description: Scheduled findings and digests that open PRs/issues, deliberately capped and conservative: architecture-audit (tech-debt sweep), test-audit (test-suite health), audit-design-docs (validate design docs against code), audit-product-docs (validate user-facing docs against code), and research-radar (weekly relevant-paper digest). Detection rules and invariants come from the repo's .claude/agent-skills.json and guidelines files.
